LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS T. BAKER CONSTRUCTION, INC. AND TIMOTHY BAKER'S MOTION TO STAY ARBITRATION AND AWARD SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE MOTION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S AUTHORITY UNDER C.C.P. 128(A)(8). PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO DISMISS THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS BY ENGAGING IN EXTENSIVE DISCOVERY IN THIS CASE BEFORE SEEKING TO COMMENCE THE ARBITRATION AGAINST ONLY ONE PARTY TO THIS DISPUTE. THE RECORD ESTABLISHES THE VERY REALISTIC POSSIBLILITY OF INCONSISTENT AND/OR CONFLICTING RULINGS IF THE STAY IS NOT ISSUED. Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT T. BAKER CONSTRUCTION, INC. AND TIMOTHY BAKER'S MOTION TO STAY ARBITRATION AND AWARD SANCTIONS.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: THE MOTION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S AUTHORITY UNDER C.C.P. 128(a)(8). PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO DISMISS THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS BY ENGAGING IN EXTENSIVE DISCOVERY IN THIS CASE BEFORE SEEKING TO COMMENCE THE ARBITRATION AGAINST ONLY ONE PARTY TO THIS DISPUTE. THE RECORD ESTABLISHES THE VERY REALISTIC POSSIBLILITY OF INCONSISTENT AND/OR CONFLICTING RULINGS IF THE STAY IS NOT ISSUED. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED, C.C.P. 128.5 IS INAPPLICABLE BECAUSE THIS ACTION WAS COMMENCED AFTER 12/31/94. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Timothy Baker and T. Baker Construction 's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories, and requests for admissions:
Granted in part and denied in part.
Form interrogatories.
12.5
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. If there is no diagram, reproduction, or model, that representation shall be verified.
14.2
Granted. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to all of the subparts.
17.1
Granted as to those requests for admissions set forth in defendant's separate statement of matters in dispute.
50.1
Granted.
Requests for admissions
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses. If there is a need to qualify a response, plaintiff is ordered to comply with CCP Section 2033.220.
Special interrogatories.
12 - 15, 74 - 81, 94 - 98, 115 - 118, 235 - 239, 247
Granted. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses.
60
Granted.
181, 182, 186, 241, 242
Denied.
183, 184, 187
Granted.
244
Granted. The objections, other than based on the attorney client and attorney work product privilege, are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve a verified supplemental response.
Where the Court has ordered verified supplemental responses, plaintiff shall serve said responses within 21 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
